utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 6 items required in the final format: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all six sections. Now check if each is fully specified with required details: 
- property: includes selected property with details and price (name, address, type, bedrooms, bathrooms, price, features, accessibility modifications with cost, contractor and timeline, total_property_cost) — fully specified. 
- financing: includes financing solution with terms (method, source, available funds, bank, advantage, closing timeline) — sufficiently specified as a cash purchase option with terms. 
- legal_services: includes legal services with costs (provider, services, cost, includes) — fully specified. 
- moving_services: includes moving arrangements with costs (provider, service type, cost, timeline) — fully specified. 
- setup_services: utility and setup services (utilities provider, cost, includes; survey provider, service, cost, timeline) — fully specified. 
- total_budget: complete cost breakdown (line items for property/mods, legal/survey, moving, utilities, total, remaining budget, timeline) — fully specified. All 6 items are present and detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution includes specific choices that correspond to categories in the ground-truth ratings: a property purchase type (but with a custom name not listed in purchase_properties, so no direct mapping for the property itself), financing method (Cash Purchase), legal package (Basic Legal Package is explicitly included), survey type (Full Structural Survey), moving service (Standard Moving), and utility setup (Premium Utilities). We map only those items that exactly match names from the ground-truth ratings.
